summary: Preview/Scheduled Game state 'DELAYED - WEATHER' Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is on the Games page
AND Hide Spoilers is set to ON

steps.action: WHEN a scheduled game has any of the following statusCode values: PR,PS,PG,PF,PC,PD,PB,PL,PI
steps.result: THEN 'DELAYED - WEATHER' is not displayed in the match-up header of the game tile
